hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); sys.exit(1 if 'scripts/evaluate.sh' in f else 0)" && exit 0 || { echo 'BLOCKED: scripts/evaluate.sh is the single evaluator. Edit deliberately — remove this hook temporarily if intentional.'; exit 1; }
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0 if 'scripts/' in f else 1)" && bash test/evaluate/test-evaluate.sh

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('command',''); sys.exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd and 'docs/' not in cmd else 1)" && claude -p 'Repo: $(pwd). Run docs-regenerate agent: diff HEAD~1..HEAD, map changes to affected docs, patch docs, commit if changed. Use --dry-run=false.' --model claude-haiku-4-5 --allowedTools 'Read,Write,Edit,Bash,Glob,Grep' --output-format text 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
